title: chargeback — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from the tier-based `features.json` gates. These are for emergency-off / staged rollout / per-tenant ops interventions. Every flag is ON in normal production; off flips are ops decisions.

flags.description: Master toggle for chargeback webhook ingest. Off = HandleChargebackWebhook refuses to create OR reconcile chargebacks — webhook payloads are recorded to the payment module's webhook log but not acted upon. Emergency-only during severe module outages. Chargebacks will still fire when the flag flips back on (webhook log replay).

Off = SubmitChargebackEvidenceJob refuses to dispatch to providers. Evidence rows still persist locally. Emergency-only during provider outages. Chargebacks auto-lose on deadline if the flag stays off past evidence_due_by.
Off = POST /chargebacks/{chargeback}/accept refuses with 503 CHARGEBACK_RDR_MAINTENANCE. Emergency-only when the refund module is unstable + we cannot rely on the RDR-triggered refund cascade.

Off = FinalizeChargebackJob skips the five finalization steps (transactions + invoice state + clawbacks + marketing). Chargeback still transitions to lost but WITHOUT downstream side effects. EMERGENCY-ONLY — leaves accounting in an inconsistent state until manual reconciliation. Never flip off without a follow-up chargeback:reconcile run.

Off = ChargebackLost does NOT fire ChargebackClawbackReferral / ChargebackClawbackCoupon downstream. Referral rewards + coupon redemptions do NOT reverse. Emergency-only if the cascade is misbehaving — admin manual reversal via referrals + coupon module CLIs then required.
Off = ChargebackLost does NOT fire marketing::ChargebackFiled. Ad-network ROAS adjustment + fraud model retraining pause. Used when marketing module is unstable.
Off = CheckChargebackStatusJob + MarkExpiredChargebacksJob + MonitorChargebackRateJob + PurgeExpiredChargebackDataJob skip. Only flip off for maintenance windows.
Off = MonitorChargebackRateJob skips ALL tenants (regardless of chargeback_rate_monitoring entitlement). No VDMP/MDMP threshold alerts fire. Merchant-account risk visibility lost. Emergency-only.
Off = CollectChargebackEvidenceJob skips. Admin must manually enter every evidence piece. Used during upstream module (invoice / notifications / support) instability.
Off = the chargeback-rate report endpoint returns 503. Used when the report generation is under load or the underlying query is unhealthy.
